free_text: Investigation of the fusion process for 10B+197Au at
Au target foils (~250 ug/cm2 thick, less than
250 keV) placed in 70 cm diameter scattering
Al foils (200 ug/cm2 thick, less than 350 keV) behind
the targets as catchers for transfer recoils and
The energy straggling due to the target and catcher
which absolute efficiencies were determined using
irradiation by the 40% HPGe, which was immediately
followed by measurement with the 20% HPGe, then
measured with the 40% HPGe again ~1 week later.
For each nuclide, several gamma-ray were identified.
For each gamma ray, a cross section value was
calculated. The reported cross section was taken as
the weighted average (WA) of these values
Normalized to Rutherford scattering at +16 deg
Uncertainty due to peak integration and
background substraction. The uncertainty reported is
the one of the WA, or the smaller uncertainty of
201Bi and 205Po productions were not observed, and
